name: copilot-persistent-memory
description: Persistent memory for GitHub Copilot across sessions

chatParticipants.name: mem
chatParticipants.description: Chat with Copilot while automatically saving conversation context across sessions

copilotMemory.semanticSearch.enabled.description: Enable semantic search using Ollama embeddings. Requires Ollama running locally with an embedding model installed. Falls back to keyword search when Ollama is unavailable.

copilotMemory.semanticSearch.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server URL for semantic search embeddings.

copilotMemory.semanticSearch.ollamaModel.description: Ollama embedding model to use. Run 'ollama pull nomic-embed-text' to install the default.

languageModelTools.name: copilot-memory_recall
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search saved project decisions, patterns, and context from previous Copilot sessions. Use this when the user asks about past decisions, why something was built a certain way, or needs context from previous conversations.

query.description: Keywords or question to search for in memory

languageModelTools.name: copilot-memory_save
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Save an important decision, architectural pattern, bug workaround, or project context for future Copilot sessions. Use this when the user makes a significant decision or explicitly asks you to remember something.

category.description: Category: decision (architectural/design choices), pattern (code patterns to follow), context (project background or constraints), bug (known issues or workarounds)
